title: Beille Silicone Baby Feeding Essentials Ages One and Up (Many Styles and Colors)
description:
Perfect for midsize items you encounter every day, Heroclip Small gear clip lets you hook and hang commuter bags and backpacks from shelves, counters, tables, chairs, or even doors. They’re also great for hanging gravity filters from tree branches, tools from ladders, or carry-on bags from roller suitcase handles. This versatile gear clip hangs securely, rotates 360 degrees, and folds compactly in ways other carabiners, clips and hooks can’t, helping you keep your gear organized and exactly where you want it, no matter the activity. The clip also features a wider clip gate compared to standard carabiners and hooks, and a hook with a grippy rubber tip for hanging things from flat surfaces. PLEASE NOTE: This product is not designed for climbing.
Deals Only Web Store
Our Store

Beille Silicone Baby Feeding Essentials Ages One and Up (Many Styles and Colors)

This thoughtfully designed, 100% food grade silicone collection by Beille is designed to make the transition from bottles and baby food to solid foods, seamless for both parents and little ones alike!

Key Features

  • SILICONE BABY FEEDING ESSENTIALS: Beille feeding essential choices includes two bowls, two divided plates, sippy cup with straw, teether, spoon and fork set and an adjustable baby bib, all designed to make your little ones transition towards independent eating easy, fun and stylish!
  • 100% FOOD GRADE SILICONE: Made from 100% BPA free, odor free and food grade silicone, Beille’s silicone baby bowl is highly durable and made from top quality materials, putting your little ones health and safety first, as they explore new foods, flavors and textures
  • BABY SUCTION BOWL: Thoughtfully designed square silicone baby bowl features a built in suction base to keep the bowl securely in place; minimizing mealtime mess and keeping the focus on feeding, this baby bowl is the perfect size, measuring five inches in diameter
  • DISHWASHER SAFE: Beille’s silicone baby bowl is dishwasher safe, capable of withstanding temperatures up to 260 Fahrenheit; additionally, this feeding set can be stored in the refrigerator or freezer when needed to preserve leftovers
  • BABY REGISTRY ITEMS: This complete silicone baby feeding set, or individual items from Beille’s 100% food grade silicone first feeding collection, are great baby shower gifts or new mom gifts, making them baby registry must haves for any growing family

If you’re ready for your little one to embark on the exciting journey towards independent eating, look no further than Beille’s Silicone Baby First Feeding Essentials Collection, available in four adorable colorways. Elevate your little ones mealtime experience with Beille's silicone baby feeding set, where safety, durability and style meet!

Many styles and colors available!
